brand_identity.name: ArtemCreations
brand_identity.target_audience: Women who value exclusivity, texture, and the story behind the object.

typography.installation_instructions: Import fonts via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,400&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;700&family=La+Belle+Aurore&display=swap');

usage_rules.headings: Use Cormorant Garamond for all H1-H3. Font weights: Light (300) or SemiBold (600). Letter-spacing: -0.02em.
usage_rules.body: Use Outfit for all paragraphs and UI text. Font weights: Light (300) for large body, Regular (400) for standard.
usage_rules.accent: Use La Belle Aurore sparingly for 'handwritten' notes or signatures (e.g., 'Handcrafted with love').

foreground.name: Soft Charcoal
foreground.description: High contrast but softer than pure black.

accent.name: Terracotta
accent.description: Use sparingly for call-to-actions or price tags.

spacing.scale: Generous. Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for section padding.
spacing.rules: Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6 or p-8). No text touching lines.

visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (2px). Avoid large rounded corners to maintain a 'fashion editorial' look.
visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle grain overlays or linen patterns on backgrounds to emphasize 'handmade'.

grid_system.description: Asymmetrical grid for product showcases. Mix 1-col and 2-col items.
rules: Never fill 100% of the grid perfectly.
Use empty cells for breathing room.
Mix product shots with 'mood' shots (texture closeups).

containers.alignment: Center aligned generally, but use asymmetric offsets for text blocks.

buttons.primary: bg-charcoal text-stone-white px-8 py-3 rounded-full hover:bg-terracotta transition-colors duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold
buttons.secondary: border border-charcoal text-charcoal px-8 py-3 rounded-full hover:bg-charcoal hover:text-stone-white transition-colors duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

cards.product: group relative bg-transparent. No border. Image aspect ratio 3:4 or 1:1. Image has 'grayscale' filter that removes on hover. Text appears below image, minimal.
cards.feature: bg-pale-sand p-8 relative overflow-hidden. Add a subtle 'fabric' texture overlay.

navigation.style: Split navigation. Logo centered. 'Shop' links on left, 'About/Journal' on right.
navigation.behavior: Sticky with backdrop-blur-md bg-stone-white/80. Bottom border 1px solid border-muted.

hero.description: White purse on bed - Clean, minimalist hero image
Wicker purse on flowers - Nature/Artisanal vibe

products.description: Yellow purse on table - Product detail
White boxes on bed - Packaging/Unboxing feel

textures.description: White towel with black border - Texture background
Close up white fabric - Subtle background pattern

icons.style: Light or Thin weight to match the elegance.

guidelines: Images should have a slow 'parallax' effect on scroll.
Text should 'fade up' with a slight delay (staggered).
Hover effects should be slow (duration-500) and subtle (scale-105).

tech_stack_specifics.shadcn_customization: Override default Shadcn radius to 0 or 2px. Change default font to Outfit. Ensure all dialogs/popovers use the 'Stone White' background, not pure white.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS FIRST: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the 'Stone White' and 'Charcoal' colors.
3. SETUP LENIS: Wrap the entire application in a Lenis smooth scroll provider.
4. BUILD LAYOUT: Create the 'Tetris Grid' component for the product listing.
5. USE IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs. Do not use placeholders.
6. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
